chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – Causing the gladness to enter upon the Momineen

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/92)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/92)

parts.text: عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( صلوات الله عليه )

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنَّ أَحَبَّ الْأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِدْخَالُ السُّرُورِ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Bakr Bin Salih, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Abdullah Bin Ibrahim, from Ali Bin Abu Ali, from Abu Ali,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, from hisasws fatherasws, from Aliasws Bin Al Husaynasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The most Beloved of the deeds to Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is causing the gladness to enter upon the Momineen’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Bakr ibn Salih from al-Hassan ibn Ali from ‘Abd Allah ibn Ibrahim from Ali ibn abu Ali from abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) who has said the following: ‘‘The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Of the most beloved deed to Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, is bringing joy to the heart of the believer.’”
